response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Yadoroki Hajime via on-screen hashtag #和守はじめの生誕祭2026. 2. Identified instrumental track 'Guns of Saxophone' and composer 'Yusuke Tsuchida' from on-screen text at 01:16. 3. Listened carefully to all segments and confirmed no vocal music is present; the track is entirely instrumental. 4. Conducted web searches to confirm if 'Guns of Saxophone' is a known vocal song; search results did not indicate any vocal version or lyrics, confirming it is an instrumental piece created for this event. 5. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false for all scenes and provided null values for song metadata.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dance performance by Yadoroki Hajime to an instrumental track titled 'Guns of Saxophone' by Yusuke Tsuchida, followed by a talk segment about her birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: A dance performance featuring Yadoroki Hajime. The background music is an instrumental track titled 'Guns of Saxophone' by Yusuke Tsuchida.
A title card for the performance, displaying 'Guns of Saxophone' and 'Music: Yusuke Tsuchida'.
A continuation of the dance performance to the instrumental track 'Guns of Saxophone'.
Yadoroki Hajime speaks to the audience, introducing her birthday merchandise for her 2026 birthday.
A final dance performance segment to the instrumental track 'Guns of Saxophone'.
